stem: A scatterplot in the xy-plane has 10 data points in a linear pattern trending down from left to right. A line of best fit passes through the approximate coordinates (1, 10), (5, 6), and (9, 2). Which of the following equations best represents the line of best fit shown?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. Slope = (6 − 10)/(5 − 1) = −1. With slope −1 and a point (1, 10): 10 = −1 + b so b = 11. Equation: y = 11 − x.

The other choices have incorrect signs of slope or intercept.
